Construction Services Offered

Attached ADUS

Attached Accessory Dwelling Units (ADUs) are integrated additions to your existing home that expand your living space while enhancing functionality and value. Whether used as a private suite for family, a rental unit for extra income, or a dedicated workspace, attached ADUs seamlessly blend with your home’s design while providing flexibility and long-term property benefits.

Detached ADUS

Detached Accessory Dwelling Units (ADUs) are standalone backyard homes that offer maximum privacy, flexibility, and value. Perfect for guest suites, rental units, or home offices, these independent structures create additional living space while maintaining separation from the main house. A detached ADU enhances your property’s functionality, provides potential rental income, and adds lasting value to your home.

Conversions

Conversion Accessory Dwelling Units (ADUs) transform existing spaces—such as garages, basements, or attics—into fully functional living areas. This type of ADU is a cost-effective way to maximize your home’s potential without expanding its footprint. Whether you’re creating a rental unit, a private suite for family, or a modern home office, conversion ADUs add versatility, comfort, and long-term value to your property.

Plans & Permits

At Hamilton Exteriors, we simplify the planning and permitting process so you can focus on your project, not the paperwork. Our experienced team handles every detail—from design plans and site assessments to submitting permit applications and coordinating with local building departments. We ensure your project meets all code requirements and moves smoothly from concept to construction, saving you time, stress, and costly delays.


The Hamilton
Exteriors Difference

Best Price Guarantee

We promise the most competitive rates in the industry. If you find a lower rate elsewhere, we will gladly beat or match it for you.

Factory Trained Installers

All our contractors are licensed, bonded, insured, and undergo thorough background and business checks.

Industry Leading Warranties

Our roofs are protected by industry-leading warranties, including up to a 50-year shingle warranty and a 35-year labor warranty.

Personal Project Manager

Enjoy a seamless renovation with a dedicated project manager handling all details and communication.

Financing Options Available For Everyone

At Effortless Renovation, we offer flexible financing solutions for every homeowner. Whether you have high or low credit, we have options to fit your needs. Our partnerships with various lenders enable us to provide competitive rates and terms for all credit profiles. Don't let financial concerns delay your roofing project - let us help you find the perfect financing solution.
